summary: Video. A 2018 DHS and NFL 'See Something, Say Something' public-service announcement. An NFL referee in a locker room delivers a spoken testimonial drawing an analogy between officiating and watching the stands, and asks fans to report suspicious activity. It closes on NFL and DHS logos and the line 'We care about the safety of our fans.' The audio is a spoken testimonial, not music. It is a conventional safety spot.
notable_text: You play an important role in keeping our communities safe.; If you see something suspicious...; Report suspicious activity to local law enforcement.; WE CARE ABOUT THE SAFETY OF OUR FANS.
